summary: Iteration 19: Premium UI/UX redesign verification - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified Login page (black/white design), Dashboard (pillar cards, ambient orb, warm orange accent), Sidebar navigation (collapsible sections), Settings page (6 tabs), Reports page (4 Gerar PDF buttons), AI Credits page (3 packages with buy buttons), and Brand selector dropdown.
passed_tests: Frontend: Login page loads with pure black/white design (zinc-950 left panel, white right panel)
Frontend: Login form has email input, password input, submit button with correct data-testid attributes
Frontend: Login works with admin@labrand.com.br / Labrand@2026!
Frontend: Dashboard loads after login with brand data
Frontend: Dashboard shows 7 pillar cards with pillar-card class and hover effects
Frontend: Dashboard shows overall progress card with warm orange accent
Frontend: Dashboard shows quick action cards (Planning, Scorecard, Narratives)
Frontend: Sidebar has collapsible sections (Pilares de Marca, Frameworks, Análise Competitiva, etc.)
Frontend: Sidebar navigation works - clicking sections expands/collapses them
Frontend: Header has glassmorphism effect (backdrop-blur-xl, border-border/50)
Frontend: Brand selector in header works (dropdown opens on click)
Frontend: Settings page loads with all 6 tabs (Perfil, Segurança, Marcas, Equipe, Integrações, Personalização)
Frontend: Reports page loads with 3 tabs (Visão Geral, Gerar Relatório, Histórico)
Frontend: Reports 'Gerar Relatório' tab shows 4 'Gerar PDF' buttons
Frontend: AI Credits page loads with balance display (99 créditos)
Frontend: AI Credits page shows 3 packages (Starter, Pro, Enterprise) with buy buttons
Frontend: BVS Score page loads with score display and warm orange accent
Frontend: Navigation between pages works via sidebar (Dashboard, Mapa Mental, BVS Score)
critical_code_review_comments: index.css: CSS variables correctly set with --secondary: 20 85% 50% (warm orange) and --accent: 20 85% 96% (light orange)
LoginPage.js: Pure black/white design with zinc-950 left panel, white right panel, no color accent on login
Layout.js: Sidebar has border-border/50, Header has backdrop-blur-xl for glassmorphism effect
Dashboard.js: Pillar cards use pillar-card class, ambient-orb for visual life, progress bars with [&>div]:bg-secondary

ui_design_verification.login_page: Pure black/white design - zinc-950 left panel with LABrand logo, white right panel with form
ui_design_verification.color_scheme: Warm orange accent (--secondary: 20 85% 50%) used for progress bars, badges, active states
ui_design_verification.sidebar: Collapsible sections with border-border/50, nav items with hover:bg-muted/60
ui_design_verification.pillar_cards: pillar-card class with hover effects (translateY(-1px), box-shadow, border-color change)
ui_design_verification.ambient_orb: Dashboard has ambient-orb element for visual life

context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX redesign verified. Login page has black/white design. Dashboard shows pillar cards with warm orange accent. Sidebar has collapsible sections. Settings has 6 tabs. Reports has 4 Gerar PDF buttons. AI Credits shows 3 packages. All navigation works. Admin credentials: admin@labrand.com.br / Labrand@2026!
